Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay , Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Rhonda Lechuga.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Daniel Castro is present.
Attorney Dustin Helmer appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of October 23, 2017 is vacated. (501)
